steps.assistant_text: Exact match via -O0 donor body and REPLACE_FUNC_BODY into the compressed timproc_uso_b1 block. The donor uses a post-call register zero local to force the target s0 save/restore and dead branch shape; INSN_PATCH bakes the USO-local D_0000014C store low immediate.

metadata.verification: Verified with make RUN_CC_CHECK=0, objdiff-cli report generate, and no-alias objdump diff of build/src/timproc_uso_b1/timproc_uso_b1.c.o against expected for timproc_uso_b1_func_0000065C. report.json fuzzy remains 59.666668 because the non_matching build does not run this post-cc donor replacement as exact scoring.
